content: Add anomaly-detection rule to system prompt (compare user values to chart's column range; skip outliers)
Add structured `warnings: list[str]` field to AnalyzeChartOut and normalize/coerce it in the response handler
Render warnings prominently in the recommendation overlay (chrome-extension)
Smoke-test with lokoprod profile: shoulders=55 should be flagged but chest=92/sleeve=46 should still drive the match
[future] Fix 'Save changes' always-active button on profile form
